children.value: The derivative as a limit and as a slope.
The derivative measures the instantaneous rate of change of a function and the slope of its tangent line.
Constant multiple, sum, product, quotient, power, and chain rules let you differentiate almost any function you meet in chemistry.
A handful of limits involving sine, cosine, and the number

children.html: eee

children.value: underlie the derivatives of trigonometric and exponential functions.
A quick reference for the derivatives you will use throughout the course.
